title: SYSTEMS AND DEVICE FOR COMPRESSING NEURAL NETWORK PARAMETERS
abstract: The present techniques generally relate to storage and/or processing of signals and/or states representative of neural network parameters in a computing device, and may relate more particularly to compressing signals and/or states representative of neural network nodes in a computing device.
claims:
Claims 1 . A method, comprising: compressing, utilizing at least one processor of at least one computing device, a set of parameters representative of a neural network model at least in part by identifying and removing one or more parameters representative of one or more redundant nodes from one or more layers of the neural network model, including retrieving one or more parameters of the set of parameters representative of the neural network model from at least one memory of the at least one computing device; and storing the compressed set of parameters representative of the neural network model in the at least one memory of the at least one computing device. 2. The method of claim 1 , wherein the set of parameters representative of the neural network model comprises one or more parameters representative of one or more convolutional layers of the neural network model. 3. The method of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the identifying and removing the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model comprises adding one or more parameters representative of one or more mask layers to the set of parameters representative of the neural network model. 4. The method of claim 3, wherein the identifying and removing the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model comprises training the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers. 5. The method of claim 4, wherein the one or more mask layers individually comprise one or more nodes individually comprising a parameter representative of a Boolean variable and a parameter representative of a floating point value. 6. The method of claim 5, wherein the training the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers comprises iteratively assigning values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers depending at least in part on the parameters 

 representative of the floating point values of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein the iteratively assigning the values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers further comprises assigning the values depending at least in part on a specified threshold parameter. 8. The method of claim 7, wherein the training the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers further comprises iteratively applying a weight decay parameter to the floating point values of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers, wherein the weight decay parameter is increased for successive iterations. 9. The method of claim 8, wherein the iteratively assigning the values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers and the iteratively applying the weight decay parameter continues until the training the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers is determined to not sufficiently maintain neural network model accuracy. 10. The method of any of claims 4 to 9, wherein the identifying and removing the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model comprises removing the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers from the set of parameters representative of the neural network model. 1 1 . The method of claim 10, further comprising retraining the compressed set of parameters representative of the neural network model. 12. An apparatus, comprising: at least one processor of at least one computing device, wherein, to compress a set of parameters representative of a neural network model, the at least one processor to retrieve one or more parameters of the set of parameters representative of the neural network model from at least one memory of the at least one computing device and to process the set of parameters representative of the neural network model to identify and remove one or more parameters representative of one or more redundant nodes from one or more layers of the neural network 

 model, the processor further to store the compressed set of parameters representative of the neural network model in the at least one memory of the at least one computing device. 13. The apparatus of claim 12, wherein the set of parameters representative of the neural network model to comprise one or more parameters representative of one or more convolutional layers of the neural network model. 14. The apparatus of claim 12 or claim 13, wherein, to the identify and remove the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model, the processor to add one or more parameters representative of one or more mask layers to the set of parameters representative of the neural network model. 15. The apparatus of claim 14, wherein, to identify and remove the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model, the processor to train the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers. 16. The apparatus of claim 15, wherein the one or more mask layers individually to comprise one or more nodes individually to comprise a parameter representative of a Boolean variable and a parameter representative of a floating point value. 17. The apparatus of claim 16, wherein, to train the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers, the processor to iteratively assign values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers at least in part in accordance with the parameters representative of the floating point values of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers. 18. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein, to iteratively assign the values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers, the processor further to assign the values at least in part in accordance with a specified threshold parameter. 19. The apparatus of claim 18, wherein, to train the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers, the processor further to iteratively apply a weight decay parameter 

 to the floating point values of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers, wherein the weight decay parameter to be increased for successive iterations. 20. The apparatus of claim 19, wherein the processor to iteratively assign the values to the Boolean variables of the one or more nodes of the one or more mask layers and to iteratively apply the weight decay parameter until the training the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers will have been determined to not sufficiently maintain neural network model accuracy. 21 . The apparatus of any of claims 15 to 20, wherein, to identify and remove the one or more parameters representative of the one or more redundant nodes from the one or more layers of the neural network model, the processor to remove the one or more parameters representative of the one or more mask layers from the set of parameters representative of the neural network model. 22. The apparatus of claim 21 , the processor further to retrain the compressed set of parameters representative of the neural network model.
